title: tabernaemontana rigida
intro: Tabernaemontana rigida, also known as the "wild caïque" or "Caïque de montagne", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana rigida include its potential to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
